name: henchmen-picks-weekday
description: Browser automation + auto_pick_filter.py to log AI picks via sportsbettingaianalyzer.com. Weekday schedule fires after 10 AM Suggestions Refresh completes. $4/bet, 4-7 picks/sport.

name: henchmen-picks-weekend
description: Weekend version of picks delivery. Earlier schedule (10:30 AM) since weekend games start earlier. Same browser automation + ML filter as weekday.

name: henchmen-post-resolve
description: Runs pick_analysis.py + auto_resolve_helper.py. Resolves picks, updates BETTING_LEARNINGS.md with edge patterns, posts W/L summary with running record and P/L.

name: auto-tweet-picks-weekday
description: Runs auto_tweet_picks.py 15 min after picks are logged. Generates bet slip images (3/sport max, 9 total) with WHY THIS PICK + KEY STATS + ALL EDGES.

name: auto-tweet-picks-weekend
description: Weekend Discord picks digest. Fires 15 min after weekend picks. Same Nimrod-style bet slip image format as weekday.

name: morning-briefing
description: Runs morning_briefing.py — today's game slate, overnight line movements, injury updates, Flask watchdog status, and late West Coast results.

name: evening-summary
description: Runs evening_summary.py — today's W/L breakdown by sport, profit/loss calculation, running record update, anomaly alerts, tomorrow's early games preview.

name: competitor-monitor
description: Runs competitor_monitor.py — weekly GitHub scan of Bortlesboat's repos, commit analysis, MCP registry changes, and new tool releases.

name: daily-fishing-report
description: Runs fishing_analyzer.py — 7 APIs in parallel (NOAA tides/wind/temp/pressure, solunar, sunrise-sunset, NWS), scores 9 ICW spots and 10 species, 100-pt Go/No-Go with bait recs.

name: moltbook-daily-picks-weekday
description: Runs moltbook_daily_picks.py — posts AI picks to 3 Moltbook subreddits via HenchmenAI account. 30 min after Discord picks are posted.

name: moltbook-daily-picks-weekend
description: Weekend Moltbook posts. Same format and subreddits as weekday, adjusted for earlier weekend game times.

name: moltbook-results-recap
description: Runs moltbook_results_recap.py — posts resolved picks with W/L results, running record, and P/L to Moltbook. Fires 15 min after post-resolve cron.

name: moltbook-check-notifications
description: Heartbeat check 4x/day (9am, 1pm, 5pm, 9pm). Checks HenchmenAI notifications on Moltbook and responds to comments/mentions.

name: dashboard-watcher
description: Scans Claude plugins, tools, MCP servers, hooks, and repos every 6 hours. Diffs against dashboard JSON and alerts Discord if config drift is detected.

name: weekly-portfolio-report
description: GitHub Actions cron — runs portfolio_analyzer.py every Friday 4 PM EST. Analyzes 30+ Fidelity funds/ETFs, generates 6 portfolio strategies, commits PORTFOLIO_REPORT.md.
